phase: Phase 35A - Jupyter GPU Sentinel Thermal Behavior Learner Training

examplePredictions.inspectionTarget: temperature slope window and reefer/setpoint context
zone consensus sensors and thermal timeline
door event timeline and affected zone
gateway receive timestamps and route segment
data quality panel before thermal interpretation

rulesSummary: Use weighted fault prototypes to compare each synthetic window against known fault families.
Apply rule boosts for high-signal inspection patterns such as door-open warming, mapping risk, weak signal, gateway delay, and sensor disagreement.
Return behavior label, likely fault family, confidence band, top alternatives, and first inspection target.
The live app can run this logic with Python stdlib only.
The neural model remains offline GPU training evidence and is not required at runtime.
implementationNote: Use this artifact to implement stdlib-only app inference. Do not require PyTorch in live runtime.
